articles.author: Holly Ellyatt
articles.title: European Central Bank keeps rates on hold in the face of inflation threat - CNBC
articles.description: The ECB's governing council opted to hold its benchmark deposit facility rate at 2% on Thursday.
articles.content:
The European Central Bank kept interest rates on hold at its April meeting, despite a surge in inflation in the euro zone since the war in Iran began.
